body_txt: When a character, either feigning genuine laughter or being obviously sarcastic , pretends to laugh along with other characters , or encourages/threatens them to do so , then abruptly tells them to shut up , in one way or another . The rejection can be a quiet aside, an unexpected tirade or anything in between. Sometimes, this is in concert with a Laugh with Me! moment. Note that this trope also applies to situations in which somebody finds something that somebody else is saying Actually Pretty Funny , but this amusement isn't changing anybody's mind. Compare Pre-Violence Laughter and contrast Tension-Cutting Laughter . The non-laughing version is "No. Just… No" Reaction . The denial/rejection can be a Blunt "No" . Compare Last Note Nightmare .
